_comment: D5 fixture for /demos/open-gen-ui (and /demos/open-gen-ui-advanced). The agent calls the `generateSandboxedUi` frontend tool with an HTML+JS payload that the renderer materializes inside an iframe[srcdoc]. The fixture's HTML is intentionally minimal but ≥ 100 chars so the iframe-mount assertion passes against aimock.

arguments.html: Pitch / Yaw / Roll

response.content: The open gen-UI element was rendered.
The advanced gen-UI flow continued with the second-step component.
